{{#unlinkedwikibase:id=Q1752915}}
{{drugbox
| verifiedrevid     = 470614430
| drug_name         =
| image             = Trifluoperazine.svg
| width             = 250
| alt               =
| caption           = <!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->
<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->

<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->

<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->

<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->

<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->

<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->
<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->
<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->
<!-- | type = mab / vaccine / combo -->

| type              =
<!-- Names -->
| pronounce         =
| tradename         = Stelazine, Eskazinyl, Eskazine, Jatroneural, others
| synonyms          =
| IUPAC_name        = 10-[3-(4-methylpiperazin-1-yl)propyl]-<br/>2-(trifluoromethyl)-10''H''-phenothiazine
<!-- Clinical data -->
| class             = [[Typical antipsychotic]]
| uses              = [[Schizophrenia]], [[generalized anxiety disorder]], [[nausea]]<ref name=AHFS2021/><ref name=BNF80/>
| side_effects      = [[Movement disorders]], sleepiness, blurry vision, dry mouth, low blood pressure<ref name=AHFS2021/><ref name=Bus2007/>
| interactions      = <!-- notable interactions -->
| pregnancy_AU      = C
| pregnancy_US      = C
| pregnancy_category=
| breastfeeding     =
| routes_of_administration= By mouth, [[Intramuscular injection|IM]]
| onset             =
| duration_of_action=
| defined_daily_dose=
| typical_dose      =
| Drugs.com         = {{drugs.com|monograph|trifluoperazine-hydrochloride}}
| MedlinePlus       = a682121

| legal_UK          = POM| legal_US          = Rx-only
| legal_status      =
| licence_US=| licence_EU=
| bioavailability   =
| metabolism        = [[Liver]]
| elimination_half-life= 10–20 hours
| excretion         =

<!-- Chemical and physical data -->
| C= 21 | F= 3 | H= 24 | N= 3 | S= 1

| SMILES= FC(F)(F)c2cc1N(c3c(Sc1cc2)cccc3)CCCN4CCN(C)CC4
| StdInChI          = 1S/C21H24F3N3S/c1-25-11-13-26(14-12-25)9-4-10-27-17-5-2-3-6-19(17)28-20-8-7-16(15-18(20)27)21(22,23)24/h2-3,5-8,15H,4,9-14H2,1H3
| StdInChI_Ref      = {{stdinchicite|correct|chemspider}}| StdInChIKey       = ZEWQUBUPAILYHI-UHFFFAOYSA-N| StdInChIKey_Ref   = {{stdinchicite|correct|chemspider}}
}}
